series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of applications, renewal forms or correspondence associated with a real estate appraiser registration, license or certification. These records may contain social security numbers or current residence addresses for appraiser applicants which are not a matter of public record for purposes of sections 149.03 and 4763.05(A)(1) of the Ohio Revised Code.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper copy is imaged and indexed on computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed on computer ; Microform: Images on microfiche are be retained final expiration of credential and ; Electronic: Images on computer are be retained final expiration of credential and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Shred
